scripts.dev: bun run dev:api & bun run dev:web
scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/api build
scripts.deploy: bun run deploy:web && bun run deploy:api
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck
